jokes.text: Or do you want me to shoot Sideshow Bob out of a cannon?
jokes.setup: Krusty offers birthday girl two celebration options - sing or violence
jokes.punchline: The absurdly violent option presented as casual entertainment
jokes.explanation: Classic Krusty - casual violence as children's entertainment with perfect character voice

jokes.text: The cannon. The cannon. The cannon. The cannon. The cannon.
jokes.setup: Children choosing between wholesome song or violence
jokes.punchline: Unanimous, enthusiastic demand for violence
jokes.explanation: Children's bloodthirsty enthusiasm subverts expectations of innocent kids

jokes.text: but maybe that's because we haven't used enough... gunpowder!
jokes.setup: Krusty acknowledges repeated failure to successfully fire Bob from cannon
jokes.punchline: Solution is more potentially lethal explosives
jokes.explanation: Escalating the danger as solution to entertainment failure

jokes.text: Don't blame me. I didn't do it.
jokes.setup: Violent cannon explosion just occurred
jokes.punchline: Bart's signature deflection of responsibility
jokes.explanation: Iconic Bart catchphrase perfectly timed after chaos

jokes.text: Comedy, thy name is Krusty.
jokes.setup: Just caused violent explosion
jokes.punchline: Pompous self-congratulation using Shakespearean structure
jokes.explanation: Clever parody of 'Frailty, thy name is woman' applied to hack comedy

jokes.text: If cartoons were meant for adults, they'd put them on in prime time.
jokes.setup: Marge doesn't understand cartoon violence appeal
jokes.punchline: Ironic statement since The Simpsons IS a primetime cartoon
jokes.explanation: Brilliant meta-joke about the show's own existence as adult primetime cartoon

jokes.text: Ooh, premium-- Wait a minute. Why?
jokes.setup: Homer excited about premium ice cream
jokes.punchline: Sudden suspicion that good things require explanation
jokes.explanation: Perfect Homer character moment - food excitement followed by paranoid awareness.

jokes.text: Doh!
jokes.setup: Realizes he has to endure Patty and Selma slideshow
jokes.punchline: Signature Homer exclamation of frustration
jokes.explanation: Perfect timing and character integration of Homer's iconic catchphrase

jokes.text: Oh, eight carousels! We're in for a real treat.
jokes.setup: Seeing multiple slide carousels
jokes.punchline: Sarcastic enthusiasm for torture ahead
jokes.explanation: Homer's defeated sarcasm about impending boredom

jokes.text: Perhaps a little something for the trip back to the cash register.
jokes.setup: Homer sampling multiple ice cream flavors
jokes.punchline: Apu's polite suggestion about Homer's predictable behavior
jokes.explanation: Apu's polite but knowing observation of Homer's gluttony

jokes.text: Or as I call 'em, the Gruesome Twosome.
jokes.setup: Explaining his unhappiness about wife's sisters visiting
jokes.punchline: Cruel but catchy nickname for Patty and Selma
jokes.explanation: Memorable alliterative insult that captures Homer's disdain

jokes.text: Yes, yes. I know the procedure for armed robbey. I do work in a conveniencestore, you know.
jokes.setup: Robber demanding money in paper bag
jokes.punchline: Apu's matter-of-fact expertise about being robbed
jokes.explanation: Brilliant deadpan acknowledgment of convenience store robbery frequency

jokes.text: The opportunity to prove yourself a hero is long gone.
jokes.setup: Homer emerging from hiding after robbery
jokes.punchline: Apu's dry dismissal of Homer's cowardice
jokes.explanation: Perfect Apu deadpan calling out Homer's cowardice

jokes.text: Ay, carumba!
jokes.setup: Seeing boring vacation slide of Selma napping
jokes.punchline: Bart's signature exclamation of exasperation
jokes.explanation: Classic Bart catchphrase perfectly timed for tedious slideshow

jokes.text: My kid's hero, Cruddy, Crummy-- Krusty the Clown!
jokes.setup: Trying to remember the TV clown's name
jokes.punchline: Multiple wrong attempts before getting it right
jokes.explanation: Homer's typical bumbling with names, building to recognition

jokes.text: Blah, blah, blah, blah, blah, blah, blah, blah.
jokes.setup: Police reading Miranda rights
jokes.punchline: Krusty dismissing constitutional protections as meaningless chatter
jokes.explanation: Krusty's casual dismissal of legal proceedings shows his character

jokes.text: Send in the clowns.
jokes.setup: Police lineup with multiple clowns
jokes.punchline: Reference to famous Sondheim song in police context
jokes.explanation: Clever musical theater reference applied to police lineup

jokes.text: Well, if the crime is making me laugh, they're all guilty!
jokes.setup: Asked to identify the robber from clown lineup
jokes.punchline: Homer's literal-minded misunderstanding of the task
jokes.explanation: Homer's innocent misinterpretation creates unexpected wholesomeness

jokes.text: Oh, goody gumdrops.
jokes.setup: Homer arriving home after missing slideshow
jokes.punchline: Overly cutesy sarcastic greeting
jokes.explanation: Good character-specific sarcasm. The childish phrase contrasts with their bitter personalities.

jokes.text: Why did the clown cross the road? To rob a Kwik-E-Mart.
jokes.setup: Classic joke structure 'Why did the chicken cross the road?'
jokes.punchline: Dark twist replacing innocent chicken with criminal clown
jokes.explanation: Clever subversion of classic joke format for news lead-in

jokes.text: The news stoy behind that enigmatic half-joke right after this commercial message.
jokes.setup: Just delivered a clown robbery pun
jokes.punchline: Self-aware acknowledgment of the joke's incompleteness
jokes.explanation: Meta-commentary on news format and joke structure

jokes.text: I've based my whole life on Krusty's teachings.
jokes.setup: Discussing Bart's admiration for Krusty
jokes.punchline: Treating clown show as philosophical/religious guidance
jokes.explanation: Excellent absurdist humor. The idea of a clown show as life philosophy is perfectly Bart and wonderfully absurd.

jokes.text: Earth to Marge. Earth to Marge. I was there. The clown is G-I-L-L-T-Y.
jokes.setup: Marge suggesting Krusty might be innocent
jokes.punchline: Homer's condescending dismissal with misspelled 'guilty'
jokes.explanation: Homer's smugness undermined by his own spelling error

jokes.text: I was there. The clown is G-I-L-L-T-Y.
jokes.setup: Homer dismissing Marge's optimism about Krusty's innocence
jokes.punchline: Misspells 'guilty' while acting authoritative
jokes.explanation: Classic Homer - confident despite being wrong. The misspelling undermines his authority perfectly.

jokes.text: hang on each new development like so many Romanian trapeze artists.
jokes.setup: Describing public fascination with Krusty trial
jokes.punchline: Oddly specific and unnecessarily elaborate circus metaphor
jokes.explanation: Pretentious news speak with absurdly specific circus reference

jokes.text: I'm dying. I'm dying.
jokes.setup: Krusty promoting pork products on air
jokes.punchline: Live heart attack during commercial endorsement
jokes.explanation: Dark comedy of Krusty's health crisis during unhealthy product promotion

jokes.text: Give a hoot. Read a book.
jokes.setup: Krusty promoting literacy after heart attack recovery
jokes.punchline: Parody of environmental PSA applied to reading
jokes.explanation: Parody of 'Give a hoot, don't pollute' PSA format

jokes.text: And his feet, they're so small.
jokes.setup: Children commenting on Krusty's changed appearance in custody
jokes.punchline: Oddly specific observation about foot size
jokes.explanation: Seemingly random observation that becomes crucial evidence

jokes.text: I plead guilty, Your Honor. Oh. I mean, not guilty. Opening nightjitters, Your Honor.
jokes.setup: Krusty entering his plea in court
jokes.punchline: Mixing up legal proceeding with show business performance
jokes.explanation: Perfect character beat showing Krusty treating court like a performance

jokes.text: Doh!
jokes.setup: Homer diving into snack display during robbery
jokes.punchline: Classic Homer exclamation after physical mishap
jokes.explanation: Perfect 'D'oh!' timing after Homer's cowardly dive

jokes.text: Aaah!
jokes.setup: Homer trying to point at Krusty in courtroom
jokes.punchline: Krusty's terrified reaction to being identified
jokes.explanation: Simple reaction beat to courtroom identification

jokes.text: No, I'm not! I'm hopping on the bandwagon.
jokes.setup: Bart accusing Homer of giving in to mob mentality
jokes.punchline: Homer proudly admitting to exactly that behavior
jokes.explanation: Perfect Homer logic - proudly admitting to the exact criticism

jokes.text: No, I can't! I can't read or write! I admit it! I'm totally illiterate. Now are you happy?
jokes.setup: Being pressed to read exhibit in court
jokes.punchline: Explosive confession of illiteracy with defensive anger
jokes.explanation: Krusty's humiliating breakdown becomes crucial plot point

jokes.text: Is it a crime to bet on sporting events? Yes, it is! Oh.
jokes.setup: Krusty asking if gambling is illegal
jokes.punchline: Immediate deflation when told yes
jokes.explanation: Quick deflation joke showing Krusty's legal ignorance

jokes.text: I knew it! This happens to me evey time.
jokes.setup: Being found guilty of armed robbery
jokes.punchline: Treating felony conviction like routine bad luck
jokes.explanation: Absurd casual reaction to serious criminal conviction

jokes.text: What the hell are you doing, Lis?
jokes.setup: Lisa watching Sideshow Bob's educational content
jokes.punchline: Bart's outrage at Lisa's 'betrayal'
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Bart's loyalty conflict. The profanity adds emphasis to his shock.

jokes.text: You're smarter than me.
jokes.setup: Bart asking Lisa for help with investigation
jokes.punchline: Painful admission of intellectual inferiority
jokes.explanation: Bart swallowing his pride to admit Lisa's intelligence

jokes.text: Don't you remember the get-well card we sent to Krusty? It was after his heartattack when he had a pacemaker put in.
jokes.setup: Noticing robber used microwave
jokes.punchline: Connecting to Krusty's pacemaker making microwave use impossible
jokes.explanation: Brilliant detective work connecting previous plot points to solve mystery

jokes.text: Hey, hey. This is not a lending library! If you're not going to buy that thing put it down, or I'll blow your heads off!
jokes.setup: Bart and Lisa reading magazine in store
jokes.punchline: Apu escalates from reasonable request to death threat
jokes.explanation: Great escalation comedy. Apu's polite-to-murderous progression is perfectly executed.

jokes.text: Evey time we say good-bye I die a little
jokes.setup: Sideshow Bob ending his show
jokes.punchline: Singing pretentious Cole Porter song to children
jokes.explanation: Good character work showing Bob's pretentious nature. The highbrow song for kids is perfectly in character.

jokes.text: Big shoes to fill. Big shoes to fill. Big shoes to fill--
jokes.setup: Sideshow Bob mentioning filling Krusty's shoes
jokes.punchline: Bart's repetition leading to realization about literal shoe sizes
jokes.explanation: Brilliant moment of realization that cracks the case wide open

jokes.text: See that? Krusty wore big floppy shoes, but he's got little feet like all good-hearted people! Sideshow Bob really fills his shoes with big ugly feet.
jokes.setup: Exposing the shoe size discrepancy
jokes.punchline: Equating foot size with moral character
jokes.explanation: Satisfying resolution with absurd moral about foot size and character

jokes.text: And I would have gotten away with it too if it weren't for these meddling kids.
jokes.setup: Bob confessing to framing Krusty
jokes.punchline: Classic Scooby-Doo villain catchphrase
jokes.explanation: Perfect pop culture reference that became iconic Simpsons moment

jokes.text: Treat kids as equals! They're people too! They're smarter than you think. they were smart enough to catch me!
jokes.setup: Bob being led away in handcuffs
jokes.punchline: Inadvertently praising the kids who exposed him
jokes.explanation: Bob's attempt at dignity undermined by complimenting his captors

jokes.text: It better not, you dimwit!
jokes.setup: Police chief apologizing for the mistake
jokes.punchline: Krusty's ungracious acceptance of apology
jokes.explanation: Perfect Krusty character moment. His inability to graciously accept an apology is very in character.
